title: platform-user — settings
description: Platform-plane settings. Distinct from the tenant plane's settings substrate — there is NO per-tenant override here. All settings apply Academorix-wide + are edited only by super_admin via the platform-admin UI. Values persist through the same `settings` module infrastructure the tenant plane uses, but the `scope` on every entry is `platform` (not `tenant`).

groups.label: Platform staff
groups.description: Company-wide policies for Academorix internal staff management.

sections.label: Onboarding
sections.description: Reminder cadence + auto-promotion policy for pending platform staff.

fields.name: onboarding_reminder_days
fields.label: Reminder days
fields.helpText: Days-since-hire on which to remind pending staffers + their managers.

fields.name: auto_promote_on_checklist_complete
fields.label: Auto-promote pending → active on checklist completion

sections.label: Offboarding
sections.description: SLA + retention window policy. Changes require compliance-officer co-sign in staging + prod.

fields.name: sla_hours
fields.label: Access-revocation SLA (hours)
fields.helpText: SOC 2 CC6.7 target. Alerting fires at half-SLA.

fields.name: retention_hold_days
fields.label: Retention hold (days)
fields.helpText: Days between soft-delete + hard-delete of offboarded rows.

sections.label: MFA enforcement
sections.description: MFA gate on the platform_admin guard. Turning off requires incident-commander sign-off + a rollback ETA.

fields.name: session_ttl_seconds
fields.label: Platform session TTL (seconds)
fields.helpText: 1h default. Shorter than the tenant plane's 8h.

fields.name: pagerduty_escalation_policy_id
fields.label: PagerDuty escalation policy id
fields.helpText: Read on every OnCallResolver query when backend=pagerduty. API key resolves separately via Doppler.

sections.label: Audit
sections.description: Correlation + retention on the audit trail.

notes: There is NO tenant-facing settings group. Platform staff policies are Academorix-wide.

There is NO user-facing settings group. A PlatformUser's OWN preferences are captured on the PlatformProfile row (timezone, display_name, avatar) — accessible via the /platform-profiles/me self-service endpoint, not via the settings module.

Every setting mutation writes an audit row via the `platform.audit` middleware. Some (offboarding.retention_hold_days, mfa.require_on_every_request) additionally require a co-signer / incident-commander sign-off surfaced as an approval workflow on the settings-mutation endpoint.
